hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT" | jq -r '.path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'src/main/java'; then cd /Users/bavodaniels/Projects/personal/rate-limit-client && ./gradlew test --daemon -q 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|gradlew|gradle-wrapper\.jar)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated/lock files directly'; exit 2; fi
